scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:engine && npm run build:demo
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:engine && npm run typecheck:examples
scripts.test:ts: npm run build:engine:ts && npm run test:syntax && node --test tests/*.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:rust && npm run test:ts
scripts.check: npm run format:rust && npm run lint:rust && npm run test && npm run build && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:syntax: node --check demo/src/main.js && node --check demo/src/feature-tour.js && node --check demo/src/test-earcon.js && node --check demo/src/feature-tour-ui.js && node --check tests/e2e/demo.spec.mjs && node --check tests/e2e/lifecycle.spec.mjs
